description_long: A glamorous adult woman is depicted wearing an elegant, floor-length evening gown with a dramatic mermaid silhouette. The dress features an off-the-shoulder neckline, ruched bodice, and a flared, semi-transparent hem that adds a sense of movement and sophistication. She wears long, fitted gloves that extend above the elbows, enhancing the formal appearance. Her hair is styled in a voluminous, side-parted bob that frames her face and neck. The figure stands upright with a poised and confident posture, exuding a sense of grace and refinement. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and her footwear is mostly obscured by the gown.
description: A poised adult woman in a formal, off-the-shoulder evening gown with long gloves and a voluminous bob hairstyle, standing upright with an elegant presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the off-the-shoulder neckline, ruched bodice, and the full detail of the gloves and hairstyle framing the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the fitted silhouette of the dress, the length of the gloves, and the layered, semi-transparent hem.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the draped back of the gown, the full length of the dress, and the hairstyle from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the dress's contour, glove, and the hairstyle's volume.
attribute_clothing_type: formal off-the-shoulder evening gown with long fitted gloves
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length voluminous bob with side part
